query:
INSERT INTO trialSignups (name, phone, email, program, location, status, scheduledTime, introCountRequired, introCountCompleted, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES 
('Alex Johnson', '555-0123', 'alex.johnson@email.com', 'Little Ninjas', 'Tomball HQ', 'scheduled', NOW(), 2, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
('Sarah Martinez', '555-0456', 'sarah.m@email.com', 'Dragon Kids', 'Tomball HQ', 'scheduled', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR), 2, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
('Mike Chen', '555-0789', 'mike.chen@email.com', 'Adult Karate', 'Tomball HQ', 'scheduled', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 HOUR), 0, 0, NOW(), NOW());
